meta.title: 9. Risk Management & Executive Communication with Patrick Miller
meta.description:
This presentation is applicable for anyone who needs to work with executive management, your C-levels and Board of Directors, in the risk management process. This can include getting funding for security projects and preparing executive management for the cyber incidents that can occur. This presentation by Patrick Miller was the favorite of many of the OnRamp attendees.

Questions and Discussion Points:

1. What terms should you avoid when discussing cyber security with executive management? And what terms will resonate better with executive management?

2. Who in your organization has risk acceptance authority? Does your organization have a risk matrix that guides risk management decisions?

3. How many solutions should you be prepared to present to management when discussing a current risk?
